current_event: Massive Solar Flare Increases Radiation Levels

events_log.event: AI directive: Persistent Dust Storm Hampers Solar Output
Martian day 26 has begun
A significant solar flare has increased radiation levels by 50% for the next cycle. All personnel are advised to seek shelter immediately to minimize exposure.
AI directive: Increased Solar Activity Boosts Energy Output

Sol 27: Subsurface ice located beneath the northern ridge. Water reserves updated—Irina +25L, Marco +41L, Zoya +36L.

daily_event.headline: Solar Activity Peaks
daily_event.summary: Solar activity has surged to 150%, boosting solar panel efficiency across the planet.

missions.title: Optimize Solar Arrays
missions.briefing: With solar activity peaking, now is the time to optimize energy collection systems.
missions.objective: Upgrade and recalibrate solar panels to maximize energy absorption during this solar surge.
missions.risk: Minimal risk of equipment overload if not properly managed

missions.title: Water Recycling Maintenance
missions.briefing: Water reserves are stable but limited; maintenance of recycling units is critical.
missions.objective: Inspect and repair water recycling units to prevent losses and improve efficiency.

npc_transmissions.message: Solar activity is at a high. Prioritize energy harvesting and monitor equipment for overload.
We are low on oxygen resources; collaboration on sharing may be necessary soon.
